title: Org Coding Standards
tagline: Read-only source of truth for your team's coding standards and review rules.
summary: Every agent reads the same canonical standards
Update once — every developer's agent sees it immediately
Read-only MCP token means agents can't clobber the rules
whyItMatters: Coding standards go stale the moment they live in a Notion page nobody reads. Here they live in a workspace your agents consult automatically, gated by a read-only MCP profile so nothing can edit them by accident.
firstPrompt: Summarize every standard in this workspace in one paragraph each.
